builds.name: Neon Agency Landing
builds.prompt: Build a dark cinematic landing page for a creative agency called 'Void Studio'. Neon accent colors on pitch black. Hero with massive serif typography, scroll-triggered fade-in sections, hover glow cards for portfolio items. Smooth scroll. Google Fonts. Single HTML file.

builds.name: Restaurant Ambiance
builds.prompt: Build a luxury restaurant landing page for 'KURO' — Japanese fine dining. Warm blacks, gold accents, elegant serif typography. Hero with a single statement word that fades in. Menu sections reveal on scroll. Hover effects on dish cards. Single HTML file.

builds.name: Minimal Portfolio
builds.prompt: Build a minimalist developer portfolio — dark mode, monospace typography, terminal aesthetic. Name is 'zero.dev'. Projects listed with staggered entrance animations. Custom cursor dot. Smooth transitions between sections on scroll. Single HTML file.

builds.name: SaaS Product Hero
builds.prompt: Build a SaaS landing page for an AI writing tool called 'Inkwell'. Clean dark UI with a purple-to-blue gradient accent. Hero with typing animation effect. Feature cards with icons that animate on hover. Scroll-triggered stats counter. Single HTML file.

builds.name: Music Artist Page
builds.prompt: Build a music artist landing page for an electronic producer called 'HXLF'. Cyberpunk aesthetic — dark with cyan and magenta. Large album art hero section. Discography grid with hover effects. Pulsing animated background element. Single HTML file.
